warning: This matrix audits traceability; it does not prove national readiness until source-limited domains are adjudicated and faculty/clinician review is complete.

domain_contracts.label: Final ESI accuracy
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Clinician confirmation that the retained reference ESI and source-derived resource signals remain appropriate for learner scoring.

domain_contracts.label: Objective safety reasoning
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Clinician calibration of vital-sign threshold messaging, pain/distress interpretation, and risk escalation language.

domain_contracts.label: Interview coverage
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Educator review of expected question domains for each complaint and learner level.

domain_contracts.label: Focused exam selection
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Case-level exam truth and faculty calibration of expected focused exam systems.

domain_contracts.label: Working diagnosis
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Clinician-adjudicated diagnosis and acceptable differential diagnoses before any numeric diagnosis score.

domain_contracts.label: Consult judgment
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Clinician-approved consult/referral truth and urgency criteria before any numeric consult score.

domain_contracts.label: Initial management priorities
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Emergency clinician review of immediate stabilization priorities, unsafe omissions, and local-practice variation.

domain_contracts.label: Reassessment targets
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Clinician validation of required reassessment triggers and course-correction thresholds.

domain_contracts.label: SOAP note
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Faculty calibration of note-quality anchors, minimum evidence use, and documentation expectations.

domain_contracts.label: SBAR handoff
domain_contracts.national_review_need: Simulation educator review of handoff triggers, expected receiver, and handoff quality anchors.

case_domain_traceability.label: Reassessment targets
case_domain_traceability.national_review_need: Clinician validation of required reassessment triggers and course-correction thresholds.

case_domain_traceability.label: SOAP note
case_domain_traceability.national_review_need: Faculty calibration of note-quality anchors, minimum evidence use, and documentation expectations.

case_domain_traceability.label: SBAR handoff
case_domain_traceability.national_review_need: Simulation educator review of handoff triggers, expected receiver, and handoff quality anchors.

case_domain_traceability.label: Final ESI accuracy
case_domain_traceability.national_review_need: Clinician confirmation that the retained reference ESI and source-derived resource signals remain appropriate for learner scoring.

case_domain_traceability.label: Objective safety reasoning
case_domain_traceability.national_review_need: Clinician calibration of vital-sign threshold messaging, pain/distress interpretation, and risk escalation language.

case_domain_traceability.national_review_need: Educator review of expected question domains for each complaint and learner level.

case_domain_traceability.national_review_need: Case-level exam truth and faculty calibration of expected focused exam systems.

national_readiness_blockers: Diagnosis remains formative-only for public cases until source-record or clinician-adjudicated diagnoses are available.
Consult/referral judgment remains formative-only until clinician-approved referral references are available.
Reassessment remains formative-only until clinician-adjudicated triggers or optional objective follow-up data are available.
Numeric case-grounded domains still require clinician or faculty calibration before national summative use.
Generated clinical evidence chunks remain quarantined until source/evidence adjudication is complete.
